DynamicTemplateString.SourceText: This script is conly called from script receiving requests from WebViewers
DynamicTemplateString.TargetText: This script is conly called from script receiving requests from WebViewers
DynamicTemplateString.Comment: com.fmi.scriptstep.text.This script is conly called from script receiving requests from WebViewers

DynamicTemplateString.SourceText: On server, we'll return the callback value which will be picked up by the callback script
DynamicTemplateString.TargetText: On server, we'll return the callback value which will be picked up by the callback script
DynamicTemplateString.Comment: com.fmi.scriptstep.text.On server, we'll return the callback value which will be picked up by the callback script

DynamicTemplateString.SourceText: @param {string} callback.fn the name of the function that will be used
DynamicTemplateString.TargetText: @param {string} callback.fn the name of the function that will be used
DynamicTemplateString.Comment: com.fmi.scriptstep.text.@param {string} callback.fn the name of the function that will be used

DynamicTemplateString.SourceText: Any way you know how that doesn't leave the layout (unless you're running this script on server)

DynamicTemplateString.Comment: com.fmi.scriptstep.text.Any way you know how that doesn't leave the layout (unless you're running this script on server)

DynamicTemplateString.SourceText: Any way you know how that doesn't leave the layout.
DynamicTemplateString.TargetText: Any way you know how that doesn't leave the layout.

DynamicTemplateString.SourceText: get a result in any way you know how!
DynamicTemplateString.TargetText: get a result in any way you know how!
DynamicTemplateString.Comment: com.fmi.scriptstep.text.get a result in any way you know how!

DynamicTemplateString.SourceText: @param {string} callback.fetchID the request in the proper api request format
DynamicTemplateString.TargetText: @param {string} callback.fetchID the request in the proper api request format
DynamicTemplateString.Comment: com.fmi.scriptstep.text.@param {string} callback.fetchID the request in the proper api request format

DynamicTemplateString.SourceText: {"fieldSeparator":"31","maxRows":100,"params":[{"type":"text","value":"Jake"},{"type":"text","value":"Smith"}],"rowSeparator":30,"sql":"SELECT FirstName, LastName FROM contacts WHERE LastName = ? AND FirstName = ? FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY"}
DynamicTemplateString.TargetText: {"fieldSeparator":"31","maxRows":100,"params":[{"type":"text","value":"Jake"},{"type":"text","value":"Smith"}],"rowSeparator":30,"sql":"SELECT FirstName, LastName FROM contacts WHERE LastName = ? AND FirstName = ? FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY"}
DynamicTemplateString.Comment: com.fmi.scriptstep.text.{"fieldSeparator":"31","maxRows":100,"params":[{"type":"text","value":"Jake"},{"type":"text","value":"Smith"}],"rowSeparator":30,"sql":"SELECT FirstName, LastName FROM contacts WHERE LastName = ? AND FirstName = ? FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY"}
